data.title: Crypto fundraising recovers in Q1, with up to $7.3B from 550 funding rounds
data.description:
Crypto funding revived after a strong performance in March, raising over $4. 8B in 122 deals. VC funds once again focused on AI projects as the most promising sector.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-fundraising-recovers-in-q1-with-up-to-7-3b-from-550-funding-rounds/

data.title: Arthur Breitman on tokenizing ‘red hot’ Uranium market
data.description:

data.description:
Cryptocurrency markets have plummeted on Friday, following renewed inflation fears.

data.title: Coinbase user allegedly lost $34.9M to scammers, March total up to $46M
data.description:
A Coinbase user reportedly lost about $34. 9 million worth of BTC to scammers, according to crypto investigator ZachXBT. ZachXBT took to his Telegram channel “Investigations by ZachXBT” on March 28 to reveal this alleged heist involving a staggering sum of 400. 099 BTC, which was transferred to an address “bc1qvlustvxhqzee9tgqers4tfungrg6c0fs4u76jf. ” He also noticed other suspected thefts […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/coinbase-user-lost-34m-to-scammers/

data.title: New Jersey Regulator Orders Robinhood, Kalshi to Halt Sports Betting
data.description:
The state regulator ordered the companies on Thursday to shutter their sports-related services for New Jersey residents and void locals’ existing bets.
source: https://decrypt.co/312171/nj-regulator-orders-robinhood-kalshi-stop-offering-sports-betting

data.title: Aptos Crypto Retests $5.45 Support, Can It Sustain Over Time?
data.description:
Aptos (APT) crypto is currently moving through a critical support retest at $5. 45, identified as the “Macro Range Low” by crypto analyst Rekt Capital. According to the analysis shared, this price level has served as a major support throughout APT’s trading history, with the token now testing it for the second consecutive month in a […] The post Aptos Crypto Retests $5
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/28/aptos-crypto-retests-5-45-support-can-it-hold-for-a-rally/

data.title: Bitcoin Eyes $83,000 Breakdown: Is A Death Cross Coming?
data.description:
Benjamin Cowen, founder of IntoTheCryptoverse, warns that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is approaching another “death cross. ”

data.title: Galaxy Digital Agrees to $200 Million Settlement Over LUNA 'Misrepresentations'
data.description:
The New York Attorney General and Galaxy Digital have agreed to a settlement over the firm's handling of LUNA before its 2022 collapse.
source: https://decrypt.co/312154/galaxy-digital-200-million-luna-settlement
